text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I run as my new self in the Takamatsunomiya
Kinen. It's the result of following a new training
regimen designed for my growing body.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I'm worried about going up against so many cool
big sisters like Bakushin O and Zephyr...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
But Trainer says I'm just as cool as them! I'm sure I
can blossom into an entirely different flower from
the one I was before!
